name: Zhejiang Linuo Flow Control Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Linuo Flow Control Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the research, development, design, production, and sale of fluid control equipment in China and internationally. The company offers segment ball, knife gate, ball, globe control, and butterfly valves; and actuators. It serves energy, petrochemical, metallurgy, chemical, paper, environmental protection, pharmaceutical, and mining industries. Zhejiang Linuo Flow Control Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2003 and is based in Ruian, China.
